rationale: The citing article is an editorial/conceptual synthesis that explicitly “summarize[s] 12 special-issue papers” and builds its argument from prior education-marketing studies, so individual cited studies may play a substantive role in that synthesis. The matched reference is an exact DOI match (10.1177/0022243720971579), and the cited paper’s topic (education outcomes under curriculum policy) fits the editorial’s stated education-domain scope. Given this context, it is not safely an obvious incidental mention.
